en.text: or (Zechariah 14:11) ; from H2763; physical (as shutting in) a net (either literally or figuratively); usually a doomed object; abstractly extermination

senses.gloss_en: or (Zechariah 14:11) ; from H2763; physical (as shutting in) a net (either literally or figuratively); usually a doomed object; abstractly extermination
